rationale: The two papers share the broad construct of "variety" (consumer variety seeking vs. dietary variety), so the cited work could plausibly serve as conceptual background on different forms of variety. However, the provided evidence includes only a DOI-level match with no in-text citation context or reference text, and the domains are somewhat different (shopping choice vs. weight-loss diet outcomes). Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but there is not enough to clearly keep.
